product_overview: GenAnki / Anki Maker is an offline-first web app for creating study-ready Anki flashcard decks from text prompts or uploaded documents. It lets users generate, review, manage, and export decks locally without requiring login.
core_goals: Create flashcards from a text topic prompt
Generate flashcards from uploaded documents with chapter scoping
Extract text from supported documents and scanned PDFs inside the browser
Review, edit, and manage decks and cards locally
Inspect past generation runs and provider usage metrics

features.name: Text Topic Generation
features.description: Users create flashcards by entering a study topic, choosing generation settings, and producing a preview deck that can be edited before export.
user_flows: Navigate to /app -> Enter a study topic -> Set the desired card count -> Choose a difficulty level -> Choose a card type -> Choose an AI provider -> Generate cards -> Review the generated cards -> Edit any card content -> Export the deck into the current collection

features.name: Document Extraction & Generation
features.description: Users upload a document, scope generation to selected sections, and create flashcards from extracted content.
user_flows: Navigate to /app -> Upload a supported document -> Wait for the file content to be parsed -> Select the chapters or headers to include -> Choose a basic or cloze deletion card type -> Generate cards from the selected sections -> Review the generated cards -> Export the deck into the current collection

Navigate to /app -> Upload a scanned PDF -> Let the browser run OCR on the pages -> Review the extracted text progress -> Select the sections to include -> Generate cards from the extracted content -> Review the generated cards -> Export the deck into the current collection

features.name: Deck Management
features.description: Users can build and maintain local decks by creating, renaming, deleting, editing, and manually adding cards before exporting them.
user_flows: Navigate to /app -> Create a new deck -> Rename the deck -> Add a card manually -> Edit the front or back of a card -> Delete a card if needed -> Export the selected deck as an .apkg package
Navigate to /app -> Select an existing deck -> Edit card content -> Remove the deck when no longer needed

features.name: Runs History Dashboard
features.description: Users can inspect past generation jobs and view their status and provider fallback details.
user_flows: Navigate to /runs -> Select a run from the history list -> Check the run status -> Inspect the generation details -> Review the provider fallback trail

features.name: Provider Usage Dashboard
features.description: Users can review token usage and call-volume metrics for generation activity.
user_flows: Navigate to /usage -> Review total token usage -> Review prompt and completion breakdowns -> Inspect provider-level call volumes and performance indicators

routes.description: Landing presentation page introducing Anki Maker.
Core deck builder, importer, exporter workspace.
Generation telemetry logs and fallback trails history.
Metrics, costs, and token consumption breakdowns.

features.name: Text Topic Generation
features.description: Generates flashcards by supplying a topic text prompt.
user_interactions: Input prompt details into text area
Configure card count slider and difficulty select
Review and edit cards in preview grid
Export generated cards into current deck

features.name: Document Extraction & Generation
features.description: Extract text content from Word, PDF, or scanned pages, with chapter selection scoping.
user_interactions: Upload document (PDF, Word, TXT, MD) via drag-and-drop or select file
Select chapters or headers from detected outline checklist
Choose basic or Cloze deletion cards
Run local in-browser OCR if scanned PDF

features.name: Deck Management
features.description: Save, edit, delete, and package cards and decks locally.
user_interactions: Create new deck using side menu button
Edit front or back content of custom card
Add card manually using basic input form
Export selected deck as standard binary package .apkg

features.name: Runs History Dashboard
features.description: Monitors and views details of past run telemetry logs.
user_interactions: Click run items from side list
Check succeeded, failed, or progress status
